name: Sort Facet items
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Controlling how filter options are sorted helps you optimize filter usability based on customer behavior and business priorities. When filter values are ordered strategically - by popularity, alphabetically, or by custom logic - customers can find relevant refinement options more quickly, which helps improve search efficiency and tends to enhance conversion rates through better-organized filter interfaces."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Strategic filter sorting enables you to guide customers toward the most relevant refinement options. This helps improve product discovery by presenting high-value filter choices prominently, supporting better conversion optimization through more intuitive and business-aligned filter organization that matches both customer needs and merchandising goals."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Integration Steps"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you want to sort facet values alphabetically, in descending or ascending order, or create custom sorting, you would need to update the facet components."}]}, {"type": "blockquote", "children": [{"type": "blockquote-line", "children": [{"text": "Componentscomponents/Facet/index.tsxcomponents/CategoryFacet/index.tsxcomponents/CheckboxFacet/index.tsxcomponents/RatingFacet/index.tsxcomponents/ColorFacet/index.tsx"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "First of all, you need to create a list of facet titles that you want to sort. Go to "}, {"text": "components/Facet/index.tsx", "bold": true}, {"text": ", create an array with facet titles, then pass down prop:"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "components/Facet/index.tsx"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "{/* ... some code ... */} {/* Create a list of Facets you want to be sorted and sorting function */} const arrayOfSortedFilters = ['brand', 'size']; const sortingLogic = (a, b) => a.get('value').localeCompare(b.get('value')); return ( {/* ... some code ... */}
{/* Pass down prop */}
);};"}]}], "lang": "plaintext"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Then you need to select the type of the Facet that you want to sort."}, {"text": "\n"}, {"text": "\n"}, {"text": "There are four of them:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "components/CategoryFacet/index.tsx"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "components/CheckboxFacet/index.tsx"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "components/RatingFacet/index.tsx"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "components/ColorFacet/index.tsx"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "We will be sorting facet values alphabetically. In our example, we have a list with 'size' and 'brand' facets and they are of type: CheckboxFacet."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "components/CheckboxFacet/index.tsx"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "{/* ... some code ... */}{/* Get arrayOfSortedFilters and sortingLogic props */}export default ({ theme = styles, config, isMobile, isExpanded: _isExpanded, facet, hidden, arrayOfSortedFilters, sortingLogic}: ICheckboxFacetProps) => { {/* ... some code ... */} const items = useMemo(() => { {/* Check if facet exists in list */} const sortedFilter = arrayOfSortedFilters.filter((el) => el === facet.get('name').toLowerCase()).length > 0; if (isExpanded && search) { const regexp = new RegExp(escapeRegExp(search), 'gi'); {/* If facet needs to be sorted, we just add sort method to items */} if(sortedFilter) { return facet.get('values').filter((i) => regexp.test(i.get('value'))).sort(sortingLogic); } return facet.get('values').filter((i) => regexp.test(i.get('value'))); } {/* If facet needs to be sorted, we just add sort method to items */} if(sortedFilter) { return facet.get('values').sort(sortingLogic); } return facet.get('values'); }, [search, isExpanded, facet]); {/* ... some code ... */}"}]}], "lang": "plaintext"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Here are the examples on how to use sort method in different Facet components."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "components/CategoryFacet/index.tsxcomponents/ColorFacet/index.tsxcomponents/RatingFacet/index.tsx"}]}, {"type": "code_block", "children": [{"type": "code_line", "children": [{"text": "{/* ... some code ... */}{/* Get arrayOfSortedFilters and sortingLogic props */}export default ({ theme = styles, config, facet, hidden, isMobile, arrayOfSortedFilters, sortingLogic}: ICategoryFacetProps) => { {/* ... some code ... */} const sortedFilter = arrayOfSortedFilters.filter((el) => el === facet.get('name').toLowerCase()).length > 0; {/* If facet needs to be sorted, we just add sort method to items */} return ( {/* ... some code ... */} {/* ... some code ... */} );};"}]}], "lang": "plaintext"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "MJS Version"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This module has been optimized for "}, {"text": "MJS version 7.1.25", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]
